# LuxCode AI

> VS Code extension that generates web pages, mobile apps, and desktop applications using AI. Open source, free, supports 6+ AI providers.

## What is LuxCode AI?
LuxCode AI is an open-source VS Code extension that lets developers generate complete projects (web, mobile, desktop) from natural language descriptions. It supports Gemini, OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, LM Studio, and OpenRouter.

## Key Features
- Generate full web pages (HTML/CSS/JS) from text descriptions
- Generate mobile apps (React Native, Flutter, Ionic)
- Generate desktop apps (Tauri, Electron, Neutralino.js)
- Generate REST APIs (Node.js/Express)
- Multi-step AI agent mode for complex tasks
- MCP server support for tool integration
- Edit, explain, and fix code with AI
- 6+ AI providers, 4 free options

## Files
- [README](https://github.com/luisitoys12/luxcode-ai/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/luisitoys12/luxcode-ai/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/luisitoys12/luxcode-ai/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Agent/AI instructions for this codebase
- [src/extension.ts](https://github.com/luisitoys12/luxcode-ai/blob/main/src/extension.ts): Entry point
- [src/services/AIService.ts](https://github.com/luisitoys12/luxcode-ai/blob/main/src/services/AIService.ts): AI provider logic

## AI Providers Supported
- Google Gemini 2.0 Flash (free)
- Groq / Llama 3.3 70B (free)
- Ollama local models (free, offline)
- LM Studio (free, offline)
- OpenRouter (free/paid, 100+ models)
- OpenAI GPT-4o (paid)

## Repository
https://github.com/luisitoys12/luxcode-ai
